_comment: Bootstrap ring_partitions.json derived from corpus_picasso.json. Role=cv -> Ring A, role=test_only -> Ring B. Replace with the output of vena-validation-preregister when that routine lands.
_n_scans_note: n_scans = test-split size (held-out predictions), NOT full-corpus size. Ring A cohorts expose only their test partition; Ring B cohorts are test_only (no train/val split). Source: SHARED_CONTRACTS §5. IvyGAP=5 confirmed empirically from smoke (2026-07-16).
